weekly_summary: Over the past three days, our security landscape has been characterized by a total of 8 findings, tracking 9 unique CVEs across various domains, including AI/ML threats, cloud/IAM, and crypto libraries. The most frequently seen CVEs include CVE-2026-20131, which appeared twice, as well as several others that appeared once, such as CVE-2026-23658 and CVE-2025-14716. The majority of activity was observed on March 19, 2026, with multiple security domains actively being exploited, highlighting the need for continued vigilance across our infrastructure.
